summary: Phase 5 Consolidated Ledgers testing complete. All 21 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional - Ledgers tab visible, Outstanding Report and Party Ledger sub-tabs working with all data sections displayed. Export buttons (Excel/PDF) present and functional.

console_warnings.message: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 () - appears to be favicon/static asset

ledgers_tab_navigation.tab_visible: PASS - Ledgers tab visible in main navigation (data-testid='tab-ledgers')

outstanding_report.dc_pending_deliveries: PASS - Shows DC number, allotted, delivered, pending columns
outstanding_report.msp_payment_pending: PASS - Shows delivered, paid qty, paid amount, pending qty cards
outstanding_report.truck_summary: PASS - Shows truck_no, trips, qty, cash_paid, diesel_paid
outstanding_report.frk_parties: PASS - Available in API (no data in current dataset)

party_ledger.transactions_table: PASS - Shows date, party, type, description, debit, credit, ref
party_ledger.filter_options: PASS - All Types, Agent, Truck, FRK Seller, Buyer all present
party_ledger.summary_cards: PASS - Total Debit, Total Credit, Balance cards visible

api_endpoints.outstanding_report: PASS - GET /api/reports/outstanding returns dc_outstanding, msp_outstanding, trucks, agents, frk_parties
api_endpoints.party_ledger: PASS - GET /api/reports/party-ledger returns ledger, party_list, total_debit, total_credit
api_endpoints.party_ledger_agent_filter: PASS - GET /api/reports/party-ledger?party_type=agent returns only Agent entries
api_endpoints.party_ledger_truck_filter: PASS - GET /api/reports/party-ledger?party_type=truck returns only Truck entries
api_endpoints.party_ledger_frk_filter: PASS - GET /api/reports/party-ledger?party_type=frk_party returns only FRK Seller entries
api_endpoints.party_ledger_buyer_filter: PASS - GET /api/reports/party-ledger?party_type=buyer returns only Buyer entries

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data. DC 'TEST-CORRECT-KMS' with 125Q pending, Agent 'Debu' with 94.55Q present in system
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 Consolidated Ledgers fully tested. Ledgers tab is the 9th tab in navigation bar. Outstanding Report shows DC pending, MSP payment pending, truck and agent summaries. Party Ledger shows all transactions with party_type filter (All Types, Agent, Truck, FRK Seller, Buyer). Both have Excel/PDF exports. Previous: iteration_16 tested Reports (CMR vs DC, Season P&L) and Gunny Bags update.
